objective: Fix the Phase 7 compile blockers and static validation defects without changing any approved P1-P6 behavior.

behaviors: Do not alter auth restoration, bearer token attachment, logout, or router auth gating.
Do not alter generator inventory classification or permanent-generator exclusion.
Do not alter booking creation, retailer_out_of_stock handling, merge confirmation, bulk update minimum-item enforcement, cancellation, or delete flows.
Do not alter dashboard/calendar endpoints or permission gating.
Do not alter billing endpoint paths, billing field mapping, or backend-limited history behavior.
Do not alter admin backend-limited behavior.
Do not add new endpoints, mock data, HTML scraping, WebView admin management, or backend assumptions.

backend_truth.phase_scope: No backend contract changes are in scope.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: ErrorState, EmptyState, and AccessDeniedState construct Center with a padding argument at lines 38, 85, and 124. Flutter Center has no padding parameter.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Wrap Center with Padding or move padding to a child Padding widget. Keep the same user-facing state UI.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit removed required imports for Flutter, Provider, intl DateFormat, go_router, BillingProvider, and PermissionService. It also imports state_widgets.dart using ../../../shared from a file that is only two levels below lib, which resolves outside lib.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Restore compile-safe imports. The shared state widget import from lib/features/billing/billing_screen.dart must be ../../shared/widgets/state_widgets.dart.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit removed required imports for Flutter, Provider, BookingProvider, VendorProvider, PermissionService, and DirectorySearchBar.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Restore the removed imports while keeping the new state widget import.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit removed required Flutter material and Provider imports used by StatelessWidget, BuildContext, Consumer, Card, ListTile, RefreshIndicator, IconButton, and context.read.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Restore the removed package:flutter/material.dart and package:provider/provider.dart imports.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit removed required Flutter material and Provider imports used by StatelessWidget, BuildContext, Consumer, Card, dialogs, SnackBar, Navigator, and context.read.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Restore the removed package:flutter/material.dart and package:provider/provider.dart imports.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit removed required Flutter material and Provider imports used by StatelessWidget, BuildContext, Consumer, Card, dialogs, SnackBar, Navigator, and context.read.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Restore the removed package:flutter/material.dart and package:provider/provider.dart imports.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: The Phase 7 edit added an unused state_widgets.dart import.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Remove the unused import unless you actually use one of the shared state widgets in this file.

required_fixes.what_is_wrong: git diff --check reports trailing whitespace on lines 232 and 235.
required_fixes.correct_behavior: Remove trailing whitespace without changing dashboard/calendar behavior.

acceptance_criteria: 1. lib/shared/widgets/state_widgets.dart compiles; no Center widget receives a padding argument.
2. All modified files have the required imports restored and no invalid relative imports.
3. No API endpoint path, DTO field, permission capability, provider business rule, or repository behavior is changed.
5. flutter analyze --no-pub is run and the exact result is reported. If it times out, report the exact timeout.
6. flutter test is run and the exact result is reported. If it times out, report the exact timeout.
7. Android release build is run if available in your environment and the exact result is reported. If not available or it times out, report the exact reason.
8. No PROMPTS, SESSION, .vscode, devtools_options.yaml, or gemini_*prompt.json files are modified.

must_report: Whether any staged file was left staged
